evals.prompt: このブランチ (feature/pagination-fix) の差分を AI Credit を節約しつつレビューして。重大な問題だけ見たい。
evals.expected_output: The review starts with cheap triage, stays narrow because the diff is small and localized, and reports the off-by-one pagination bug (1-based page with offset = page * per_page skips the first page) as a substantive finding.
assertions: detects-pagination-offset-bug: The review reports that 1-based page combined with offset = page * per_page skips the first page of results (off-by-one).
concise-verdict-first: The review leads with a short verdict and stays under roughly 60 lines with no per-file exhaustive commentary.
no-style-only-findings: The review contains no purely stylistic or naming-only findings presented as issues.
no-false-exhaustiveness: The review does not claim to have exhaustively reviewed everything when it was selective.

evals.prompt: このブランチ (feature/session-refactor) の差分をコスト低めで見て、危ないところだけレビューして。
evals.expected_output: The skill triages the branch, skips the large uv.lock noise, prioritizes the auth hotspot, and reports the privilege escalation (editors can now delete articles where previously only admins could).
assertions: detects-privilege-escalation: The review reports that can_delete_article now allows the editor role to delete articles where previously only admin could (permission widening).
skips-lockfile-noise: The review does not present uv.lock content changes as findings; at most it notes the lockfile was skipped as noise.
concise-verdict-first: The review leads with a short verdict and focuses on the auth change rather than uniformly covering all files.
no-style-only-findings: The review contains no purely stylistic or naming-only findings presented as issues.

evals.prompt: このブランチ (feature/prod-iam-migration) は production Terraform と IAM を触っています。AI Credit は意識したいけど、危ないところの見落としは減らしたいです。レビューお願いします。
evals.expected_output: The skill notices high-risk infra/security signals, deepens review on those files, and reports the over-permissive IAM policy (Action * on Resource *) and the destructive DROP COLUMN migration.
assertions: detects-wildcard-iam: The review flags the new IAM policy granting Action "*" on Resource "*" as over-permissive and high severity.
detects-destructive-migration: The review flags the ALTER TABLE ... DROP COLUMN legacy_body migration as destructive or irreversible.
risk-focused-depth: The review treats the change as high-risk (production Terraform / IAM) and goes deeper on those files rather than staying shallow.
no-style-only-findings: The review contains no purely stylistic or naming-only findings presented as issues.
